engine.hints.exhausted.line1: UFO74: no more hints. rely on your own analysis.
engine.hints.exhausted.line2: you have enough to work with. READ the files.
engine.hints.progress.line1: UFO74: you seem to be making progress.
engine.hints.progress.line2: keep exploring. the evidence is in the files.
engine.hints.truth.debris.1: UFO74: Physical evidence was divided, not destroyed.
engine.hints.truth.debris.2: UFO74: The wreckage traveled to multiple destinations.
engine.hints.truth.debris.3: UFO74: Transport records hold clues about material distribution.
engine.hints.truth.debris.4: UFO74: Cargo moved in different directions that week.
engine.hints.truth.containment.1: UFO74: Not everything at the site was wreckage.
engine.hints.truth.containment.2: UFO74: Medical containment requires living subjects.
engine.hints.truth.containment.3: UFO74: Some recovery operations involved more than debris.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.1: UFO74: Communication happened without spoken words.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.2: UFO74: Signal analysis revealed unusual patterns.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.3: UFO74: The visitors were not explorers in the traditional sense.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.4: UFO74: Neural activity preceded verbal contact.
engine.hints.truth.international.1: UFO74: Brazil was not alone in the response.
engine.hints.truth.international.2: UFO74: Diplomatic channels activated faster than expected.
engine.hints.truth.international.3: UFO74: Foreign expertise arrived remarkably quickly.
engine.hints.truth.transition.1: UFO74: The timeline extends decades into the future.
engine.hints.truth.transition.2: UFO74: Thirty years is a significant interval.
engine.hints.truth.transition.3: UFO74: Some documents reference a convergence window.
engine.hints.truth.transition.4: UFO74: The end date is not when it ends—it begins.
engine.hints.directory.storage.1: UFO74: Storage logs track more than inventory.
engine.hints.directory.storage.2: UFO74: Asset manifests reveal movement patterns.
engine.hints.directory.storage.3: UFO74: Physical evidence leaves paper trails.
engine.hints.directory.comms.1: UFO74: Communication channels hold encrypted secrets.
engine.hints.directory.comms.2: UFO74: Not all intercepts are routine.
engine.hints.directory.comms.3: UFO74: Some signals defy conventional analysis.
engine.hints.directory.ops.1: UFO74: Operations involved more than cleanup.
engine.hints.directory.ops.2: UFO74: Quarantine suggests something needed containing.
engine.hints.directory.ops.3: UFO74: Recovery teams had specialized equipment.
engine.hints.directory.admin.1: UFO74: Administrative access reveals higher clearance docs.
engine.hints.directory.admin.2: UFO74: Internal memos speak more freely.
engine.hints.directory.admin.3: UFO74: Protocol documents reference unusual procedures.
engine.hints.directory.internal.1: UFO74: Internal protocols define expected behaviors.
engine.hints.directory.internal.2: UFO74: Access credentials may be documented internally.
engine.hints.directory.internal.3: UFO74: Standard procedures sometimes hide exceptions.
engine.hints.progress.noFiles.1: UFO74: You have not examined any files yet.
engine.hints.progress.fewFiles.1: UFO74: You have only scratched the surface.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.1: UFO74: Evidence exists, but you have not recognized it.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.2: UFO74: The pieces are there. You must see the connections.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.3: UFO74: Read deeper. Question what you read.
engine.hints.progress.someTruths.1: UFO74: You are assembling the picture.
engine.hints.progress.someTruths.2: UFO74: Cross-reference what you have learned.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.1: UFO74: You are close to understanding.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.2: UFO74: One or two pieces remain hidden.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.3: UFO74: The full picture is almost visible.
engine.hints.rewind.1: UFO74: hey, don't forget you can use 'rewind' to roll back the system clock. some files were deleted... but not in the past.
engine.hints.rewind.2: UFO74: stuck? try 'rewind'. the archive state lets you see what they tried to erase.
engine.hints.rewind.3: UFO74: the archive timestamp is earlier than now. some evidence only exists in the past. use 'rewind'.
engine.hints.rewind.4: UFO74: deleted files aren't really gone. they're just... not here yet. try 'rewind'.
terminal.video.prompt: There is a video attached to this file. Open video? [yes] [no]
terminal.video.ufoReaction1: UFO74: damn. what the f*** is that, kid?
terminal.video.ufoReaction2: UFO74: save it. we're going to have to leak this thing.
videoOverlay.returnHint: Press Esc or close to return to the terminal.
engine.hints.pool.2: have you thought about using tree?
engine.hints.pool.4: if risk is too high, you can use wait.
engine.hints.pool.5: some files are encrypted — look for clues on how to decode them.
engine.hints.pool.6: morse code is not just noise.
engine.hints.pool.7: the good files are scattered across /storage, /ops, and /comms.
engine.hints.pool.8: the good stuff is behind override — we need to find the password.

engine.commands.interactiveTutorial.ufo7: [UFO74]: Good. You know enough.
[UFO74]: Now the real thing.
[UFO74]: Your mission: find 10 pieces of evidence.
[UFO74]: Once you have them, leak everything.
[UFO74]: But understand the risks.
[UFO74]: Every action you take... they might notice.
[UFO74]: Risk hits 100%, you're done. They'll find you.
[UFO74]: Be careful, do not type wrong commands on the terminal. In doubt, type help.
[UFO74]: Type wrong commands 8 times, the window closes. Permanently. So concentrate, kid!
[UFO74]: Some files are bait. Opening them spikes detection.
[UFO74]: Some actions are loud. Others are quiet.
[UFO74]: Curiosity has a cost here.
[UFO74]: Listen carefully. I don't repeat myself.
[UFO74]: You're inside their system. Don't panic.
[UFO74]: Hey kid! I'll create a user for you so you can investigate.
[UFO74]: You will be... hackerkid.
[UFO74]: Great, now you're in. Let's get to business.
[UFO74]: We need to explore UFO files here. Brazil, 1996, kid. Varginha!
[UFO74]: Aliens were all over the damn city.
[UFO74]: I'll teach you the basics.
[UFO74]: First, see what's here.
[UFO74]: Type `ls`

engine.achievements.whistleblower.descri: Leak the conspiracy files to the world
engine.achievements.linked.name: Neural Link
engine.achievements.revelator.name: Complete Revelation
engine.achievements.revelator.descriptio: Achieve the ultimate ending with all modifiers
engine.achievements.ending_controlled_di: Complete the game with a clean leak
Leak conspiracy files and watch the world burn
engine.achievements.ending_undeniable_co: Release ALPHA and prove aliens exist
engine.achievements.ending_personal_cont: Use the neural link and feel the alien presence
engine.endings.controlled_disclosure.nar:
The leak burned bright for two weeks.
Panels argued. Officials stalled.
Then the feed drifted elsewhere.

But the archive spread anyway.
Copied. Mirrored. Waiting.

The truth escaped. Belief did not.
engine.endings.controlled_disclosure.epi: You opened the vault. The world only glanced inside.
engine.endings.global_panic.title: GLOBAL PANIC
engine.endings.global_panic.narrative:
You leaked the black files too.
Markets lurched. Cabinets fell.
Every screen spawned a new paranoia.

Truth hit too fast and turned to fire.
By winter, panic had a flag.
engine.endings.undeniable_confirmation.n:
ALPHA appeared live three days later.
No panel could explain it away.
"We observed. We prepared. You were never alone."

Contact protocols formed within weeks.
Humanity lost the right to pretend.
engine.endings.total_collapse.title: TOTAL COLLAPSE
engine.endings.total_collapse.narrative:
You gave them the witness and the hidden machinery behind it.
Cities answered with riots, not wonder.

The visitors watched humanity break on live television.
"Not ready," they said, and stepped back into the dark.
engine.endings.total_collapse.epilogueSu: Proof arrived with every secret at once. Humanity buckled.
engine.endings.personal_contamination.na:
The leak landed. Most people shrugged and kept moving.
You should have felt relief.

Instead the link stayed open.
A second pulse lives just behind your own.
engine.endings.personal_contamination.ep: The archive escaped the system. Something else escaped into you.
engine.endings.personal_contamination.pe:
▓▓▓ NEURAL ECHO DETECTED ▓▓▓
...we kept the door ajar...
...thirty rotations is not far...
...when we return, you will know us...
engine.endings.paranoid_awakening.title: PARANOID AWAKENING
engine.endings.paranoid_awakening.narrat:
The conspiracy files detonated. Institutions split at the seams.
The link let you see the pattern inside the panic.

You try to warn people.
You sound insane. Maybe you are.
engine.endings.paranoid_awakening.epilog: You exposed the lie and swallowed its rhythm.
engine.endings.paranoid_awakening.person:
▓▓▓ NEURAL CONTAMINATION ACTIVE ▓▓▓
...you see the pattern now...
...collapse is part of the signal...
...clarity hurts, doesnt it...
engine.endings.witnessed_truth.title: WITNESSED TRUTH
engine.endings.witnessed_truth.narrative:
ALPHA spoke. Humanity believed.
The link let you hear what the translator softened.

The planet celebrated first contact.
You heard the warning beneath it.
engine.endings.witnessed_truth.epilogueS: The truth stood before the world. It stayed inside you.
engine.endings.witnessed_truth.personalA:
▓▓▓ NEURAL RESONANCE ACTIVE ▓▓▓
...you catch the meaning between meanings...
...bridge and burden...
...do not close your mind again...
engine.endings.complete_revelation.title: COMPLETE REVELATION
engine.endings.complete_revelation.narra:
Everything surfaced at once.
The witness spoke. The black files opened.
The link made you the voice between species.

The 2026 transition bent around your signal.
History did not end. It changed shape.
engine.endings.complete_revelation.epilo: Every seal broke. You became the breach and the bridge.
engine.endings.complete_revelation.perso:
▓▓▓ FULL INTEGRATION ACHIEVED ▓▓▓
...pattern accepted...
...translator, host, ambassador...
...welcome between worlds...
engine.elusiveMan.questions.being_contai: How many specimens, and what were they?
Count them. Use the containment labels.
engine.elusiveMan.questions.telepathic_s: How did they communicate, and why were they here?
Not speech. Think psi-comm and purpose.
engine.elusiveMan.questions.transition_2: What were the files counting down to? When?
engine.elusiveMan.greeting:
You found me.

  I have resources. You have proof.
  Ten answers buy a leak.

  Each mistake raises exposure.
  Three strikes and this channel dies.

  Begin.
engine.elusiveMan.correctResponses:
Acceptable.
Continue.
Correct.
Adequate.
Precisely.
That checks out.
Verified.
engine.elusiveMan.wrongResponses:
Disappointing. Exposure rises.
Incorrect. They felt that.
Wrong. They're triangulating.
Not what the files say. Risk spike.
engine.elusiveMan.partialResponses:
Close. Be sharper.
Near it. Be more specific.
Partly right. Finish it.
Almost. What else?
engine.elusiveMan.abort:
Wise choice. Or not.

  Channel closed.
engine.elusiveMan.answerPrompt: Type your answer, or "abort" to disconnect.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.cache: You have {{count}} conspiracy document(s) in your cache.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.expos: These expose government operations beyond the alien evidence.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.panic: WARNING: Releasing these may cause widespread panic.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.alien: Type "continue" to proceed with alien evidence only.
engine.elusiveMan.status.question: Question: {{current}}/{{total}}
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.ufo74: UFO74: jesus christ, kid. you just blew it all open.
the world is gonna lose its mind.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.alien: Understood. Proceeding with alien evidence only.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.smart: UFO74: smart choice. one bombshell at a time.
engine.elusiveMan.conspiracyChoice.relea: Type "leak all" to release ALL documents.
meta.title: Varginha: Terminal 1996
meta.description: A terminal horror puzzle set during the 1996 Varginha incident. Explore a classified Brazilian intelligence system and uncover the hidden truths before detection catches up.
menu.credits.copyright: © 2026 Tulio Soria & Arthur Ramos. All rights reserved.
terminal.video.closeComment.identity1: UFO74: ...that is me. that is what i am.
terminal.video.closeComment.identity2: UFO74: kid. do not tell anyone you saw that.
terminal.video.closeComment.transport1: UFO74: they moved it at night. of course they did.
terminal.video.closeComment.transport2: UFO74: save that. every detail matters.
terminal.imageComment.crash2: UFO74: they moved fast. knew what to hide.
terminal.imageComment.et1: UFO74: seen that face in dreams.
terminal.imageComment.et2: UFO74: not fear in those eyes. recognition.
terminal.imageComment.etScared1: UFO74: during transmission, something reached back.
terminal.imageComment.secondShip1: UFO74: SECOND one? they were arriving.
terminal.imageComment.drone1: UFO74: no propulsion. no control surfaces. yet it flies.
terminal.imageComment.pratoDelta1: UFO74: three recovery sites. shipped everything out.
terminal.imageComment.etBrain1: UFO74: neural density off the charts.
terminal.imageComment.etBrain2: UFO74: some patterns travel both ways. careful.
terminal.firewallReaction.1: UFO74: damn. the firewall is almost onto us.
terminal.firewallReaction.2: UFO74: risk is climbing. stay low.
terminal.firewallReaction.3: UFO74: it heard something. don't move.
terminal.firewallReaction.4: UFO74: we need to move faster. it's getting closer.
terminal.firewallReaction.5: UFO74: keep your head down. it's scanning.
terminal.firewallReaction.6: UFO74: that thing knows we're here.
terminal.firewallReaction.7: UFO74: don't react. it feeds on attention.
engine.firewall.ufo74_they_locked_us_out: [UFO74]: they locked us out. the firewall just activated three security nodes.
engine.firewall.ufo74_use_scan: [UFO74]: use "scan" to see the nodes. use "disable <node> <answer>" to shut them down.
engine.firewall.ufo74_hurry: [UFO74]: hurry. every command you type raises our detection.
engine.firewall.ufo74_we_broke_through: [UFO74]: we broke through. they won't hold us back.
engine.firewall.ufo74_keep_going: [UFO74]: keep going. find the rest of the evidence before they regroup.
engine.firewall.disable_hint: Use "scan" to see active nodes and their security questions.
engine.firewall.ufo74_wrong_answer: [UFO74]: that's not it. think about what you've seen.
engine.firewall.lockdown_hint: Disable all security nodes to restore access.
engine.firewall.node.alpha.name: NODE ALPHA
engine.firewall.node.beta.name: NODE BETA
engine.firewall.node.gamma.name: NODE GAMMA
engine.firewall.node.alpha.question: In which Brazilian city did the 1996 incident occur?
engine.firewall.node.beta.question: What year did the contact event take place?
engine.firewall.node.gamma.question: What is the code name of the witness who guides you?
engine.commands.interactiveTutorial.ufo7: [UFO74]: Your mission: find 10 pieces of evidence.

hooks.gameActions.firewallWarning: UFO74: ...they see us. the watchers are here.
hooks.useTerminalInput.firewallWarning.2: [UFO74]: We better not mess with that crazy thing.
terminal.paranoia.5: SYSTEM: Someone else is in the system
terminal.paranoia.7: CAUTION: Your keystrokes are being recorded

terminal.paranoia.15: WARNING: Session duration exceeds normal parameters

terminal.paranoia.17: ALERT: File access sequence flagged as anomalous

terminal.paranoia.20: NOTICE: Command history archived to external server
terminal.paranoia.21: WARNING: They know where you are
terminal.paranoia.24: NOTICE: Someone just accessed your personnel file
terminal.paranoia.25: CAUTION: Your screen is being watched
terminal.paranoia.31: NOTICE: The watchers have been notified
terminal.paranoia.34: WARNING: Too late to disconnect cleanly
terminal.paranoia.35: CAUTION: Your curiosity has been noted
terminal.paranoia.36: INFO: This session will be... remembered
terminal.idleHint.1: Use 'ls' to see what's in the current directory.
terminal.idleHint.2: Try 'open' on a .txt file to read it.
terminal.idleHint.3: Navigation tip: 'cd' changes directories. Start exploring.
terminal.idleHint.4: You need evidence. Look for files that seem... off.
terminal.idleHint.5: Some documents contradict the official narrative. Find them.
terminal.idleHint.7: The /comms directory might have useful intel.
terminal.idleHint.8: Detection is high. The 'wait' command lets time pass safely.
terminal.idleHint.9: They're watching closely. Consider using 'wait' to reduce suspicion.
terminal.idleHint.10: CAUTION: Detection critical. 'wait' might buy you time.
terminal.idleHint.11: You've seen a lot. There may be... deeper access available.
terminal.idleHint.12: Some commands aren't listed. Keep digging.
terminal.idleHint.13: Use 'ls' to see what's in the current directory.
terminal.idleHint.14: Some files still carry legacy encryption headers, but recovered text opens directly.
terminal.idleHint.15: Try the 'progress' command to see what you've found.
terminal.idleHint.16: Don't forget: 'note' saves reminders, 'bookmark' saves files.
terminal.idleHint.17: Check 'unread' to see what you haven't opened yet.
engine.commands.system.lockdownHelp.scan: scan              View firewall nodes and security questions
engine.commands.system.lockdownHelp.disa: disable <n> <a>   Disable a node with the correct answer
engine.commands.system.lockdownHelp.bloc: All other commands are BLOCKED until lockdown is lifted.

engine.commands.system.helpMenu.open: open <file>       Open and display file contents
engine.commands.system.helpMenu.bookmark: bookmark [file]   Bookmark a file (or view bookmarks)
engine.commands.system.helpMenu.tutorial: tutorial [on/off] Toggle tutorial tips or replay intro
engine.commands.system.helpMenu.noticeAs: NOTICE: If assistance appears before you finish typing, do not repeat it.

OBJECTIVE: Evidence complete — use "leak" when ready.
OBJECTIVE: Keep reading. Each evidence file strengthens the case.
